channel.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Press
channel.description: Official news feed for PHRINUSOMYIS global operations and updates.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Commits to Global Operations
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — PHRINUSOMYIS has finalized the trajectory for its worldwide operations. The company is moving beyond regional borders to bring its stadium productions to the global circuit, targeting major markets effective immediately.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Launches Luxury Entertainment Division
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — The company has revealed a new division focused on the intersection of luxury branding and large-scale production environments. This structure serves as the blueprint for the 2026 international calendar.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Activates Borderless Production Model
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — PHRINUSOMYIS has launched a custom-built operations hub, removing logistical barriers of stadium-scale entertainment for global deployment.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Unveils "Sports Theater" Concepts
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — First look at 2026 stadium designs introducing immersive Sports Theater environments for 50,000-seat venues.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Unifies Global Media Voice
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — Launch of a unified international media office across West Africa, Europe, and the Middle East ahead of 2026 circuit.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Declares 2026 "Year of Expansion"
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — Entry into 2026 operational phase targeting multi-continental stadium expansion.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Enters Dubai Market
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — Expansion into UAE with Dubai as a key luxury production hub.

item.title: July 24 Confirmed for International Stadium Debut
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — Official confirmation of July 24, 2026 West Africa stadium debut introducing Sports Theater model.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Finalizes Strategic Global Alliances
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — International partnerships secured for global deployment of 2026 stadium operations.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Targets UK Stadium Circuit
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — UK identified as priority market for stadium rollout in 2026.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Expands into French Market
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — Entry into France with Paris positioned as key European node.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Secures Spain as Critical Territory
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — Expansion into Madrid and Barcelona for 2026 global tour coverage.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Enters China’s Stadium Sector
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — Strategic expansion into Beijing and Shanghai stadium markets.

item.title: West Africa Designated as Central Operations Hub
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — West Africa established as command center for all 2026 global stadium events.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Declares Full Operational Readiness
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — Global systems cleared for full international deployment.

item.title: PHRINUSOMYIS Launches International Debut in West Africa
item.description: HQ | BROOKLYN, NY — First official stadium-scale production introducing Sports Theater model.
